framework.name: Shadow AI Prevalence
framework.description: Widespread use of unsanctioned AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.) within enterprises creates governance challenges and measurement difficulties for productivity/profit impact.
framework.raw_quote: The report also highlights the widespread use of 'shadow AI'—unsanctioned tools like ChatGPT—and the ongoing challenge of measuring AI's impact on productivity and profit

source.title: MIT report: 95% of generative AI pilots at companies are failing | Fortune
